label: 第222話
source_locator: 単行本25巻 目次 p.87
summary_short: 五条と宿儺の決戦までの一か月、双方が準備を進める。12月24日、高専の仲間たちは新宿へ向かう五条を送り出す。
summary_full: 五条と宿儺の決戦までの一か月、双方が準備を進める。12月24日、高専の仲間たちは新宿へ向かう五条を送り出す。高専側は一か月の訓練と作戦準備を行い、虎杖の腕や乙骨との会話など複数の仕込みが示される。決戦当日、仲間たちは五条の背中を叩いて送り出す。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: As the final showdown between 五条悟 and 宿儺 approaches, both sides make their preparations. When December 24th arrives, the 呪術高専 students do their best to encourage their sensei as he heads into the most important fight of his life.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 宿儺 uses his sokushinbutsu mummy to subsitute the last finger. 裏梅 presents to 宿儺 three more of his fingers and apologizes for being unable to find the last one no matter how hard they tried. 宿儺 doesn't mind because he's long figured that 五条悟 hid the last one as a method of indefinitely suspending 悠仁's execution. 裏梅 takes this as a second humiliating defeat at the hands of 五条 while cursing their aching wound. There is residual pain despite 裏梅 having used 反転術式 . 宿儺 assures 裏梅 he can make up for a single digit of his divided power by using the mummified remains of his former body. Musing about the irony of how his mummy was dressed like a sokushinbutsu , 宿儺 wonders if it was 羂索 or 天元 's doing. Meanwhile, 羂索 faces a TV as he queries his コガネ on how many people have died from 術式 removal due to never entering a colony. At コガネ's response of 61 players, 羂索 postulates that the players didn't participate due to fearing death or having to kill, but then suggests that they lacked intuition considering how Hiromi 's added rule could have allowed them to avoid both scenarios. He laments how the people of Japan always incorrectly believe their lives are stable when in reality they're always on the brink of ruin. He continues to express his contempt for those who will not risk their lives and those who are willing to die at any time without any hope for the future. Believing that everyone should know the feeling of approaching their ideals step by step, 羂索 states that he is talking to 天元 about this. 五条, 家入, and 伊地知 remember the fallen. At 呪術高専, 五条 laments about how only he, 硝子 , and 伊地知 remain from their days at 呪術高専. 硝子 comments that there's also still " one who hasn't fully recovered ", to which 五条 agrees. He admits that he always thought 七海 was the type who could survive no matter what, causing 伊地知 to apologize for having survived while 七海 has died. 五条 is appalled that 伊地知 would believe that 五条 would have preferred 七海 to live over himself. He tells 伊地知 that he has one monumental task to carry out, so he should do his best. 硝子 adds that while they're on the topic of 七海 猪野 has something to say about him to 五条. "Their only chance to defeat 宿儺 would be immediately after he's fought 五条." In the dojo, 冥冥 is hosting an online betting game on the outcome of 五条's upcoming clash with 宿儺. She's happily relishing in the fact that the jujutsu regulation changes after the 渋谷事変 increased the clientele base for these previously barely legal services. She's earning a steady five billion by selling pay-per-view broadcasts even without betting. 冥冥 expresses how she's never been as grateful as she is now to have her 黒鳥操術 while 憂憂 reminds her to fatten up the crows. 冥冥 places her digital pad down and observes 悠仁 and 日下部 spar with judo techniques. 悠仁 swiftly throws 日下部 down before demanding he get a handle on "it", with 日下部 uncharacteristically responding with enthusiasm. Meanwhile, 乙骨憂太 and 狗巻棘 walk down a dark hallway lit only by candles and discuss how they won't tell 悠仁 about 棘's injury as it was solely on 宿儺. 五条's students encourage him going into the most important fight of his life. The fated day arrives on December 24th in the now-ruined city of 新宿, which has become a realm of demons: "魔境". 宿儺, 裏梅, and 羂索 prepare on the roof of a skyscraper. 羂索 leaves to hunt down the remaining 死滅回游 players. Irritated with 羂索's presence, 裏梅 is more than willing to let him go, but 羂索 reminds them that if he had left any sooner, 五条 would have killed him. Additionally, he didn't intend to move until now because he's counting on the main forces of 呪術高専, including 憂太, 秤金次 , and 禪院真希 all attacking 宿儺 if he defeats 五条. The battle of the strongest is about to begin!! As 五条悟 prepares to leave 呪術高専 for 魔境 新宿, his students ponder the best way to motivate their sensei. They've never had a reason not to expect an effortless victory before. 五条 appears before them completely devoid of his normally annoying persona. His intense aura even intimidates 憂太, 真希, and 秤. 悠仁 however, isn't intimidated in the slightest and tells his sensei that the 無限 is in the way of a proper pat on the back. 五条 relaxes, chuckling as he invites everyone to slap him on the back before departing with 歌姫 and 楽巌寺 . Everyone there proceeds to slap him on the back and provide words of encouragement and support. With a confident grin on his face, 五条 assures everyone that he'll come out on top. 宿儺's grin mirrors him in anticipation as the battle of the strongest is about to begin.

candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 東京 呪術高専 新宿
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 呪物 宿儺's 宿儺の指 x4 五条悟の術式 無下限呪術 無限 (言及のみ) 無限 (言及のみ) 式神 コガネ

key_events_verified_phase11: 五条と宿儺の決戦までの一か月、双方が準備を進める。
12月24日、高専の仲間たちは新宿へ向かう五条を送り出す。
高専側は一か月の訓練と作戦準備を行い、虎杖の腕や乙骨との会話など複数の仕込みが示される。
決戦当日、仲間たちは五条の背中を叩いて送り出す。
verification_notes_phase11: 集英社公式24～30巻目次・巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別資料、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した最終区間。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
